baseline_description: R² = 0 corresponds to predicting the train-set mean (no-skill predictor) in the relevant (linear or log10) space.
rf_reference_description: RandomForestRegressor with sklearn defaults, 100 trees, averaged over 5 seeds, fit directly on the raw element mole-fraction / loading columns with no descriptor engineering. Reference baseline reported in the source materials_problems repository; not used directly by the scorer.
